backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a personal calorie tracker backend with persistent storage for food entries, step records, and calorie limits. Exposes functions to add/delete/query food entries, log/retrieve steps, set calorie limits, and compute daily summaries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Daily Dashboard date initialization bug (defaulting to today's local date instead of a hardcoded/stale value) was fixed in Dashboard.tsx, mapped to test requirement REQ-18.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Personal Calorie Tracker', mounting the app into a root div and loading the Vite entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration with a root layout route wrapping Layout and Outlet, plus dashboard, upload, and history routes, with an index redirect to /dashboard, all wrapped in a React Query QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/FoodEntryCard.ts: Card component displaying a food log entry with a thumbnail image via ExternalBlob.getDirectURL(), food name, date, calorie badge, and an optional delete button with loading spinner.
frontend/src/components/ImageDropzone.ts: Drag-and-drop image upload zone with file input fallback, drag-over visual feedback, image preview with a clear button, and image-only file type validation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, desktop nav, mobile bottom nav bar, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution; uses useRouterState to highlight the active route.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: Reusable stat display card showing a label, numeric/string value, optional unit and icon, and five color variants (default, success, warning, danger, info) via CSS variable tokens.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including food entries, daily summary, steps, calorie limits, and seven-day history, each wired to the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS custom properties for a forest-green themed design system with light and dark mode variants, and sets base typography using Inter and Plus Jakarta Sans fonts via Tailwind.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying daily calorie consumption, steps, net calories, and a 7-day bar chart with date navigation, inline calorie limit editing, step logging, and food entry deletion.
frontend/src/pages/FoodUpload.tsx: Food logging page that lets users upload a meal photo, auto-estimates food name and calories from the file, and submits the entry to the backend with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Displays a history page listing all tracked dates sorted descending, showing each day's calorie consumption vs. limit with over/under badges, and navigates to the dashboard for a selected date. Also renders a 'Days Tracked' stat card at the top.
frontend/src/utils/calorieEstimator.ts: Provides client-side heuristic utilities to estimate calories from a file by matching its name against a keyword-to-calorie-range map and using file size as a portion signal, plus a helper to generate a human-readable food name from a filename.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode via class, maps CSS variable-based design tokens (colors, radii, shadows) to Tailwind utilities, and registers the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 13) for a personal calorie tracker app, documenting existing features, known issues, architectural notes, and a summary of planned and implemented functionality.
